name: Reconcile admission and discharge medication lists
prompt: Read admission_meds.txt and discharge_meds.txt. Parse medications from both lists and perform medication reconciliation. For each medication identify: name, dose, unit, route, frequency. Then compare the two lists to find: (1) continued medications (same drug, same dose), (2) changed medications (same drug, different dose), (3) discontinued medications (in admission but not discharge), (4) new medications (in discharge but not admission), (5) switched medications (different drug in same class). Write reconciliation.json with: admission_meds (array of medication objects), discharge_meds (array of medication objects), changes object containing: continued (array), increased (array), discontinued (array), new_meds (array), switched (array).

criteria.description: Dose changes and discontinued medications detected
